# Results

## Objective

This document summarizes the outputs generated by the Glassdoor sentiment analysis pipeline.

The project compares two sentiment analysis models:

- VADER
- pysentimiento

The comparison is based on sentiment distribution and agreement rate.

---

## Generated Files

The pipeline generates the following output files:

```text
data/processed/glassdoor_sentiment_results.csv
outputs/reports/model_comparison_report.txt
outputs/figures/sentiment_distribution.png
